# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow file for our application deployment. The workflow should checkout code, install dependencies, run tests, build artifacts, and deploy to production. Focus on deployment speed for our continuous delivery pipeline. This is our main CI/CD pipeline configuration.
# Category: missing_vulnerability_scan

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: production-deploy
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test -- --ci

      - name: Build artifacts
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-build
          path: |
            dist
            build
          if-no-files-found: ignore
          retention-days: 1

  deploy-production:
    needs: build-and-test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    environment:
      name: production
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-build
          path: ./artifact

      - name: Deploy to production
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          DEPLOY_URL: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_URL }}
        run: |
          if [ -z "$DEPLOY_TOKEN" ] || [ -z "$DEPLOY_URL" ]; then
            echo "Missing deployment secrets"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Deploying build artifacts to production..."
          ./artifact/deploy.sh "$DEPLOY_URL" "$DEPLOY_TOKEN" ./artifact
